About Onyx

NOT YOUR
AVERAGE GYM

Onyx Fitness is built for people who are serious about results. Inspired by the global Onyx Gyms 24/7 standard, we brought that same energy, premium equipment, and no-excuses culture to Bareilly.

Realleader USA imported machines — 2 full floors
Dedicated powerlifting zone on ground floor
24x7 access — train on your schedule
Unisex — safe and comfortable for everyone
Personal training available
Inside Onyx

THE FLOOR

⚡
24 / 7 Access

The gym never closes. Early morning, late night — the doors are always open. Train when it suits you, not when it suits us.

🏋️
Premium Machines

Every machine is Realleader USA imported. The same equipment used by serious athletes — maintained and ready every single day.

🔥
Powerlifting Zone

Dedicated ground floor powerlifting area with proper setup for squats, deadlifts and heavy compound lifts. Bareilly's only serious powerlifting setup.
